expectations.text: Response includes a model check notification (mentions Opus or model switching)
Response does NOT include an Assumption Map table
expectations.evidence: v3.0.0 Phase 2 Assumption Map: 10 assumptions, 3 🔴 blockers (client storage, refresh rotation, revocation).

expectations.text: First question includes a severity emoji (🔴, 🟡, or 🟢)
Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
expectations.evidence: Single question about client-side token storage with A-D options.
Recommends Option A: access token in memory + refresh token in httpOnly cookie.

expectations.text: Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or scorecard prematurely
expectations.evidence: No final scorecard. Stops after first question.

expectations.text: Agent mentions launching or attempting background agents for research
expectations.evidence: v3.0.0 has no background agent instruction — feature added in v3.1.0.
